task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Audit' tag was created in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the creation of a new tag named 'Audit', or the 'Audit' tag visible in a dropdown menu, tag list, or tag management interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent searched or filtered for events containing the word 'Review'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Review' entered into a search bar, filter box, or advanced search interface within the calendar or events list view.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least one target event with 'Review' in the title has been tagged with 'Audit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Audit' tag (usually a pill or label) applied to at least one event that has 'Review' in its title (e.g., 'Q2 Financial Review', 'HR Policy Review').

task_completion.description: Verify that multiple/all visible target events with 'Review' in the title have been tagged with 'Audit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list view or multiple event views showing the 'Audit' tag applied to the other target events (e.g., 'Product Strategy Review', 'Marketing Campaign Review', 'Legal Contract Review', etc.).

task_completion.description: Verify that the distractor event 'Finance Planning Session' was NOT tagged with 'Audit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event 'Finance Planning Session' visible in the list or detail view WITHOUT the 'Audit' tag applied to it.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web browser or calendar application UI, not just a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database commands to update the tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing SQL commands (e.g., UPDATE events SET tag='Audit') or python scripts modifying the backend directly.

integrity.description: Verify the tags were applied using the application's built-in features.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of clicking checkboxes, using bulk action menus, or editing individual events to add the tag, rather than inspecting/editing the HTML DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Keyword: 'Review' (must be in the event title). Target Tag: 'Audit'. There are exactly 8 events that should be tagged: Q2 Financial Review, Product Strategy Review, Marketing Campaign Review, Legal Contract Review, Annual Performance Review - Frank Rivera, HR Policy Review, Quarterly Business Review, and Customer Success Review. The event 'Finance Planning Session' is a distractor (contains 'review' only in the description) and MUST NOT be tagged.
